summary.zh: 用一次短促横向摆动提示错误或需要关注的输入。
summary.en: Use one brief horizontal shake for errors or inputs that need attention.

definition.zh: 快速左右抖动，用来提示错误或输入被拒绝。
definition.en: A rapid alternating displacement flags invalid input or a rejected action.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

purpose.zh: 用一次短促横向动作提示错误、拒绝或需要关注的输入。
purpose.en: Use one brief horizontal motion to signal an error, rejection, or input needing attention.

frequency.zh: 仅在明确错误时低频使用；连续验证期间避免反复摇晃。
frequency.en: Use infrequently for explicit errors and avoid repetition during continuous validation.

trigger.zh: 由提交失败或服务器拒绝触发，同时展示可读错误信息。
trigger.en: Trigger on submission failure or server rejection while showing readable error text.

enterExit.zh: 错误出现时完成 2–3 次衰减摆动，状态解除时不播放反向动画。
enterExit.en: Run 2–3 decaying oscillations when the error appears, with no reverse animation when cleared.

interruptibility.zh: 新输入立即停止摇晃；重复错误只在用户再次提交后触发。
interruptibility.en: Stop shaking on new input and retrigger only after another submission.

gestureRules.zh: 无需手势；焦点移到错误摘要或首个无效字段，并保持键盘路径清楚。
gestureRules.en: No gesture is required; move focus to an error summary or first invalid field with a clear keyboard path.

reducedMotion.zh: 移除位移，使用错误边框、图标和文本；必要时保留一次短颜色脉冲。
reducedMotion.en: Remove travel and use error border, icon, and text, with at most one brief color pulse.

reviewNotes.zh: 摇晃不能替代错误文案。
reviewNotes.en: Never rely on shaking in place of error copy.

reviewNotes.zh: 控制幅度，避免整页或大容器移动。
reviewNotes.en: Keep amplitude small and avoid moving a page or large container.
